completed_steps: Created directory structure with three zones (project / .claude / .github)
Copied harness-init skill files (SKILL.md, analyze.py, command templates)
Wrote CLAUDE.md with golden rules and module guide
Configured .claude/settings.json with hooks (JSON validation, dangerous command blocker, post-edit reminder)
Created 6 slash commands (plan, review, catchup, checkpoint, audit, update)
Wrote docs/changelog.md with current CC features (March 2026)
Wrote README.md as single guide (17 topics, 312 lines)
Final verification: 25 files, all links valid, all JSON valid
next_steps: Verify GitHub Actions workflow triggers correctly
Test harness-init skill by installing and running in a test project
decisions_made: Self-referential design: every tool genuinely serves this repo (ADR-001)
README is the single guide, no separate docs/guide/ (ADR-003)
Three-zone structure: project files / .claude tools / .github automation
Living knowledge system framing (not tips collection) to create genuine need for all tools
Conceptualization theory mapping: README as grammar, .claude files as alphabet
harness-init deploys 5 generic commands; /update is repo-specific, not included in skill templates
